chapter_title.ar: باب فِي تَسْمِيَةِ مَنْ رَآهُ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 77 – Regarding the naming of the ones who saw him<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/ 4)
text: هُ رَآهُ عِنْدَ الْحَجَرِ الْأَسْوَدِ وَ النَّاسُ يَتَجَاذَبُونَ عَلَيْهِ وَ هُوَ يَقُولُ مَا بِهَذَا أُمِرُوا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Abu Abdullah Bin Salih that,
‘He saw him<sup>asws</sup> by the Black Stone (Al-Hajr Al-Aswad), and the people were flocking upon it, and he<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘This is no what they have been Commanded with’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ali ibn Ibrahim from abu ‘Abdallah ibn Salih who has said the following. “I saw him (the twelfth Imam) near the Black Stone while people were clinging over it. The Imam (a.s.) would say, “They are not commanded in this condition ( to kiss the Black Stone.”
